title: What are this images in EoE
display_title: What are this images in EoE
wikitext:
[]: What are this images in EoE?             Quote Post by Nephilim » Sat Jul 31, 2004 12:24 am I've never seen this topic in any forums, so here it is... What are this pictures in EoE? just before the live action scene starts, some images are shown, that appear to be some female images, but i can't tell who they are, or what they are doing (i marked the images so you can see better) 1) This one seems like a woman (Asuka?) in a towel: 2) This one seems like some girl laying down: 3) This one seems like Misato: 4) This shows a girl in school uniform: 5) This seems like a half naked girl: 6) I don't know what the hell this is:

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Sat Jul 31, 2004 1:01 am That last one looks like legs. I always assumed those were supposed to be images of Asuka, Rei, and Misato. I don't see who else they would be.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sat Jul 31, 2004 1:45 am Yea the last one looks like legs , I saw that in EoE , but never though to bring it up. This might turn out to be a good thread

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Sat Jul 31, 2004 2:22 am It's basically the same thing as in the series when the girls (in Shinji's mind) were naked and saying "do you want to be one with me" and all that.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Sat Jul 31, 2004 2:24 am It looks like the one in the dress is Asuka. The other ones look like Misato. The last one reminds me of when Misato is in the Bath tub. I think her legs stuck out of the water like that.

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Sat Jul 31, 2004 2:27 am I think the second one looks like Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Sat Jul 31, 2004 2:28 am Oh right, Rei I in her swimsuit maybe.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Sat Jul 31, 2004 3:12 am Well, the Rei thing could have been a clip from when Shinji fell on her that day that he walked into her appartment... and she was naked... It looks like how she was lying down.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Sat Jul 31, 2004 3:46 am She was laying with her legs straight, not up like that. He was sort of in between her legs sorta.

[]: Re: What are this images in EoE?             Quote Post by child-of-lillith » Sat Jul 31, 2004 4:27 am ok... all i am going to say is... the last one is a woman, sat down, legs spread, with her fingers spreading something else down there... as for the other images, yeah Rei Misato and Asuka in different compromising views...

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sat Jul 31, 2004 10:06 am I was wondering I should have posted that... but Child beat me to the punch, thats what I was gonna say dammit!

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Sat Jul 31, 2004 12:22 pm I still don't get the last picture... i can see two legs, but i can't see what is that thing in the middle. Does someone have a better screen cap?, or maybe someone with a nice EoE resolution movie would do de favor of takin a screencap :roll: I opened this topic because i've heard that in one of this pics Asuka was doing something naughty to someone, i don't know if this is true.

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Sat Jul 31, 2004 1:18 pm If somebody would have enough nerves to watch EoE in slow-mo i bet we would find about 100 weird pictures. Anyone up for the challenge? :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by Mr.Guy » Sat Jul 31, 2004 1:21 pm I see duel images in most of the pictures. In the first three images I also see two arms/hands intertwined. In the 4th pic I see some white liquid (not to sure about this...) and something else. I don't see any other image in the one with the half naked Asuka. The last one looks like legs to me, and in the center it looks like Misato giving Shinji her cross (she's mid-way closing his hand on it). At least, that's what I see :? . I'll have to watch EoE again. -EDIT- *Raises hand* I volunteer to watch EoE in slow motion! If I never come back, you'll all know that I died some horrible death witnessing some horrible picture

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sat Jul 31, 2004 1:27 pm Hmmmmm, I wonder how long that would take to watch the entire move in slow-mo......I'll say this, that will be a whole day or two down the drain.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Sat Jul 31, 2004 2:04 pm The screen-caps that i posted show drawings of women, maybe Rei, Asuka and Misato. This drawings are shown mixed with a video of a live action naked woman, with some weird effects.

[]:             Quote Post by ShoKenju » Sat Jul 31, 2004 3:25 pm definitely Misato's last time with Kaji when she puts the capsule on the drawer

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Sat Jul 31, 2004 3:30 pm Then why are her panties on? No! Bad max! BAD!

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Jul 31, 2004 3:41 pm max3000 wrote: Then why are her panties on?

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sat Jul 31, 2004 4:14 pm Japan has this little law that prevents them from showing *cough* "naughty bits of da south".
